message.content:
@startuml
participant "Service A" as SA #LightBlue
participant "Service B" as SB #LightGreen
participant "Service C" as SC #Pink

note right of SA : CPIX document with:\n- Encrypted Content Keys\n- Content Keys signed by Service A\n- Delivery data for Service B\n- Delivery data for Service C\n- Document signed by Service A

SA ->> SB 
SB --> SC 

@enduml
